_meta.description: Golden answers for synthetic test document assessment. Each entry lists findings MUST be produced by the rule engine for that document. Tests are pass/fail: all required findings must appear.
_meta.usage: Run tests/run_golden_tests.py from apps/api/ to validate
_meta.notes: Vague language findings emitted at L3 by universal scanner. root_cause_depth fires at L3.

sop_001_deviation_handling.description: SOP with missing section headers, unsigned approvals, no change history, vague language

required_findings.reason: Vague 'as needed' detected by universal scanner
Vague 'if applicable' detected by universal scanner
Missing Prepared By / author roles detected in SOP header
SOP review cycle not defined
CAPA System Deficiency pattern must match SOP on deviation handling

known_gaps: L1 missing_section for Scope — 'scope' text found in document body bypasses check
L2 approval_signature — SOP profile has check but blank '(Pending)' may not trigger

capa_001_oos_investigation.description: CAPA with 'human error' root cause, missing effectiveness metrics, vague language

required_findings.reason: Root cause 'human error' without systemic mechanism must fire
Vague 'going forward' in corrective action
Vague 'acceptable range' without specification
CAPA target completion date not defined
CAPA System Deficiency pattern must fire for CAPA documents

known_gaps: L3 root_cause_depth (from _check_l3_root_cause_depth) — human_error_root_cause fires first from a different check

atm_001_hplc_method.description: HPLC method with unspecified system suitability limits, 'acceptable' without numeric criteria

required_findings.reason: System suitability section uses 'satisfactory/acceptable' without numeric limits
Vague 'as needed' in mobile phase adjustment
QA approval signature block not present (author is Dr. Nair but no QA Director signature line)
OOS investigation trigger criteria not defined in ATM

known_gaps: L5 acceptance_criteria for numeric system suitability — LLM engine handles in production
Column temperature not flagged as critical parameter — requires LLM

deviation_001_temperature_excursion.description: Deviation report with single-line RCA, vague impact assessment, missing disposition

required_findings.reason: RCA present but no structured methodology or evidence citation
QA approval signature line is blank
Patient safety impact assessment not documented
CAPA System Deficiency failure pattern matches deviation document

known_gaps: L4 ALCOA contemporaneous for delayed recording — full check needs document-type awareness
L2 missing_element for batch disposition — fires as L8 disposition_not_justified instead

lir_001_oos_assay.description: LIR with result within spec (93.8%, limit 90-110%), blank approvals, retesting without authorization

required_findings.reason: QA approval signature block blank — critical for LIR
Phase II retesting documented without QA pre-authorization
OOS Investigation Failure pattern matches LIR document

forbidden_findings.reason: Result 93.8% is WITHIN specification (90-110%) — must NOT be flagged as OOS

known_gaps: L4 data integrity finding for corrected chromatogram without justification — requires deeper ALCOA check
